scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && docker compose up -d --wait postgres && dotenv -- concurrently -k -n server,desktop -c cyan,green "npm run dev:sync-server" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dist: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dist -w apps/desktop
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dist:mac -w apps/desktop
scripts.dist:win: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dist:win -w apps/desktop
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run dist:linux -w apps/desktop
